method: Synthetic control on published RTT provider series (Apr 2013 onward): non-negative donor weights fit on a 24-month pre-window over English acute trusts with complete series; effect = actual minus synthetic over up to 24 post months; uncertainty from placebo studies on 40 donors (asterisk = |effect| > 2 placebo sd). Trust-grain: site-level effects are invisible; these are trust-level access and flow effects.

events.name: Northumbria: emergency care consolidates to the purpose-built NSECH
events.story: Three district general A&Es consolidated into the Northumbria Specialist Emergency Care Hospital, the first purpose-built emergency hospital in England, with the legacy sites becoming planned-care hospitals.
headline: pct18:0.9pp
wl:-5.6%
comp:-15.2%

events.name: Chorley & South Ribble: A&E closes (staffing), downgraded to urgent care
events.story: Lancashire Teaching Hospitals closed Chorley A&E in April 2016 on rota-staffing grounds, concentrating emergency care at Royal Preston; it later reopened part-hours.
headline: pct18:-5.8pp
wl:10.1%
comp:6.1%

events.name: Grantham A&E closes overnight (staffing)
events.story: United Lincolnshire closed Grantham A&E overnight from August 2016 to keep the Lincoln and Boston rotas safe, one of the clearest staffing-led downgrades on record.
headline: pct18:-2.2pp
wl:5.5%
comp:19.6%

events.name: Mid Staffordshire dissolved: services transfer to UHNM
events.story: Mid Staffordshire NHS FT was dissolved in November 2014; University Hospitals of North Midlands absorbed Stafford's services. The receiving trust is the measured entity.
headline: pct18:-2.3pp
wl:32.6%
comp:29.4%

events.name: Liverpool: Royal and Aintree merge (vascular and stroke consolidate)
events.story: Royal Liverpool and Aintree merged in October 2019 into Liverpool University Hospitals, consolidating vascular surgery, stroke and other services across the city. Pre-period is the sum of the two predecessor trusts.
headline: pct18:-2.9pp
wl:18.0%
comp:15.1%

events.name: Sandwell & West Birmingham: acute care consolidates to Midland Met
events.story: City and Sandwell acute services consolidated into the new Midland Metropolitan University Hospital from October 2024; the post-window is short and grows with each publication.
headline: pct18:-0.2pp
wl:-1.0%
comp:24.6%
